title: . Applicability. All rights and benefits granted to workers under this Code shall, except as may
content:
. Applicability. All rights and benefits granted to workers under this Code shall, except as may 
otherwise be provided herein, apply alike to all workers, whether agricultural or non-agricultural. (As amended 
by Presidential Decree No. 570-A, November 1, 1974) 
Chapter II 
EMANCIPATION OF TENANTS
